name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: Embedded Hebrew now trains the source-window indicator: when Kodi confirms a real embedded Hebrew track while you play, MasterKodi shares that release name (movie/series separated) with the community list, so next time it shows as 'מוטמע' in the Gears sources window - before you even play. Toggle under General settings. Only the release name is shared, nothing personal.
